omitted_declarations.policy_reference: To facilitate in-app advertising, we may share the collected data with trusted third-party advertising partners. These partners may use this information to: Display targeted ads within our app or in other apps; Measure the effectiveness of ads; Conduct analysis and research to improve advertising strategies.
